节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Declare sliderstyle
State triggered by the event.
The user touches or clicks the thumb.
The user is dragging the slider.

The user stops dragging the slider by lifting their finger or releasing the mouse device.

NOTE:
The trigger occurs when an invalid value is restored to the default value, that is, when the value is set to less than min or greater than max.
The user moves the thumb by touching or clicking the track.
Interaction mode between the user and the slider.
Users can drag the slider or touch the track to move the slider. The slider moves as soon as the mouse or finger is pressed.
Users are not allowed to move the slider by touching the slider.

Users can drag the slider or touch the track to move the slider. The slider moves when the mouse is released or finger is lifted, if the release/lift position coincides with the screen press position.

Defines the callback type used in SlideRange.

NOTE:
Currently, this API takes effect only when MIN ≤ from ≤ to ≤ MAX (the values of MIN and MAX do not depend on the values set, but on the actual values that take effect). You can set either from or to, or you can set both from and to. When the API is effective, if the set from value is between the adjacent multiples of step, then from takes the value of the left interval multiple of step or MIN as the corrected value. When the API is effective, if the set to value is between the adjacent multiples of step, then to takes the value of the right interval multiple of step or MAX as the corrected value. After from and to have taken their corrected values, when value is undefined or null, it takes the same value as from; when value is a number type, and if value ≤ from, then it takes from; if value > to, then it takes to.
Start of the slide range.
End of the slide range.
Parameters of the slider.
Current progress.
注释信息: @default same as the value of min

节点.功能描述: Minimum value.

Maximum value.

NOTE:
If the value of min is greater than or equal to the value of max, the min value defaults to 0, and the max value defaults to 100. If the value is not within the [min, max] range, the value of min or max is used, whichever is closer.

Step of the slider.

NOTE:
If this parameter is set to a value less than 0 or greater than the value of max, the default value is used.
Style of the slider thumb and track.
Whether the slider moves horizontally or vertically.
Whether the slider values are reversed. By default, the values increase from left to right for a horizontal slider and from top to bottom for a vertical slider.
Enumerates the types of the slider in the block direction.
Round slider.
Slider with an image background.
Slider in a custom shape.
Describes the style of the slider in the block direction.
Type of the slider in the block direction.
Image resource of the slider. The area size for displaying the image is subject to the blockSize attribute. Be mindful of the image size when selecting an image.
Custom shape of the slider.
You need a custom class to implement the ContentModifier API.
Current progress.
Minimum value.
Maximum value.
Step of the slider.
Triggers slider changes.
Provides an interface for the slide bar component.
Called when the slider bar component is used.
Defines the accessibility information of slider step point.
Set the accessibility of the slider step point.
Defines the accessibility information of slider step point.
Set the accessibility of the slider step points.
Defines the options for customizing the accessibility of content within a slider. These options can be used to enhance the user experience for assistive technologies.
The text used for accessibility purposes. This text will be read by screen readers to provide a more descriptive label for the slider content.
A more detailed description for accessibility. This can provide additional context about the slider content for users relying on assistive technologies.
The accessibility level of the slider content. This could be used to indicate the importance or priority of the content for assistive technologies.
Indicates whether the slider content should be treated as an accessibility group.
Options used for customizing the prefix part of the slider. It extends the SliderCustomContentOptions to inherit accessibility customization options.
Options used for customizing the suffix part of the slider. It extends the SliderCustomContentOptions to inherit accessibility customization options.
Defines the attribute functions of Slider.
Called when the slider color of the slider bar is set.
Called when the track color of the slider is set.
Called when the slider of the slider bar is set to slide over the area color.
Called when the slider of the slider bar is set to slide over the area color.
Called when the minimum label is set.
Called when the maximum label is set.
Called when setting whether to display step size.
Called when setting whether to display step size.
Called when the percentage of bubble prompt is set when sliding. percentage is displayed by default.
注释信息: @param { boolean } value - Whether to display the bubble.

节点.功能描述: Called when the thickness of track is set.

Triggered when the slider is dragged or clicked.

NOTE:
The Begin and End states are triggered when the slider is clicked with a gesture. The Moving and Click states are triggered when the value of value changes. If the coherent action is a drag action, the Click state will not be triggered.
Called when the border color of block is set.
注释信息: @param { ResourceColor } value - the border color of block.

节点.功能描述: Sets the prefix part of the slider. The prefix is the content that appears before the main slider component. This can be any valid custom UI component structure. These options can include accessibility settings.
注释信息: @param { ComponentContent } content - Custom components that will be displayed as the prefix.
@param { SliderPrefixOptions } [options] - Optional options for customizing the prefix.

parameters.说明: Custom components that will be displayed as the prefix.
SliderPrefixOptions } [options] - Optional options for customizing the prefix.

节点.功能描述: Sets the suffix part of the slider. The suffix is the content that appears after the main slider component. This can be any valid custom UI component structure. These options can include accessibility settings.
注释信息: @param { ComponentContent } content - Custom components that will be displayed as the suffix.
@param { SliderSuffixOptions } [options] - Optional options for customizing the suffix.

parameters.说明: Custom components that will be displayed as the suffix.
SliderSuffixOptions } [options] - Optional options for customizing the suffix.
